title: Foundation: Project Scaffold, DB (Full Schema Reconciled with Migration SQL), Auth, Shell, Queue Declarations
description: Establishes the project skeleton, complete PostgreSQL schema and migrations, Auth.js credentials auth with JWT claims, French app shell, env validation, and infrastructure clients (Drizzle, Redis, R2, BullMQ queue declarations) without pipeline business logic.

env_vars_required.description: PostgreSQL 16 connection string used by Next.js and workers
Redis 7 URL for BullMQ and SSE pub/sub
Cloudflare R2 account id for S3-compatible endpoint
R2 bucket used for documents and report artifacts
mem0 API key for preference memory
Auth.js JWT/cookie signing secret (>=32 bytes random)
Enable trusted proxy host headers behind reverse proxy
Internal URL for PDF worker health checks

database_migrations.sql:
CREATE TABLE attestation_record (
  attestation_id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v7(),
  company_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES company(company_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  created_by uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES "user"(user_id) ON DELETE RESTRICT,
  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  note text NULL,
  source_reference text NULL,
  upgraded_by_observation_id uuid NULL,
  CONSTRAINT attestation_note_len CHECK (char_length(note) <= 1000),
  CONSTRAINT attestation_source_ref_len CHECK (char_length(source_reference) <= 500)
);
CREATE INDEX attestation_company_id_idx ON attestation_record (company_id);
CREATE INDEX attestation_upgraded_partial_idx ON attestation_record (upgraded_by_observation_id) WHERE upgraded_by_observation_id IS NOT NULL;

CREATE TABLE observation (
  observation_id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v7(),
  company_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES company(company_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  label text NOT NULL,
  normalized_key text NOT NULL,
  value text NOT NULL,
  numeric_value numeric NULL,
  unit text NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  data_type data_type_enum NOT NULL,
  time_behavior time_behavior_enum NOT NULL,
  period_start date NULL,
  period_end date NULL,
  category_id uuid NULL REFERENCES document_category(category_id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  source_document_version_id uuid NULL REFERENCES document_version(document_version_id) ON DELETE RESTRICT,
  status observation_status NOT NULL DEFAULT 'candidate',
  provenance_type provenance_type_enum NOT NULL,
  evidence_block_ids uuid[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
  attestation_record_id uuid NULL REFERENCES attestation_record(attestation_id) ON DELETE RESTRICT DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED,
  confidence_score float8 NULL,
  extraction_run_id uuid NULL REFERENCES pipeline_run(run_id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  created_by uuid NULL REFERENCES "user"(user_id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  CONSTRAINT observation_confidence_range CHECK (confidence_score BETWEEN 0.0 AND 1.0),
  CONSTRAINT observation_document_requires_evidence CHECK (provenance_type <> 'document' OR array_length(evidence_block_ids,1) > 0),
  CONSTRAINT observation_manual_requires_attestation CHECK (provenance_type <> 'manual' OR attestation_record_id IS NOT NULL)
);
CREATE INDEX observation_company_key_status_idx ON observation (company_id, normalized_key, status);
CREATE INDEX observation_company_period_idx ON observation (company_id, period_start, period_end);
CREATE INDEX observation_source_doc_partial_idx ON observation (source_document_version_id) WHERE source_document_version_id IS NOT NULL;
CREATE INDEX observation_category_partial_idx ON observation (category_id) WHERE category_id IS NOT NULL;
CREATE INDEX observation_attestation_partial_idx ON observation (attestation_record_id) WHERE attestation_record_id IS NOT NULL;
CREATE INDEX observation_evidence_ids_idx ON observation USING gin (evidence_block_ids);
CREATE INDEX observation_normalized_key_trgm_idx ON observation USING gin (normalized_key gin_trgm_ops);
CREATE TRIGGER observation_set_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON observation FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION set_updated_at();

ALTER TABLE attestation_record
  ADD CONSTRAINT attestation_upgraded_by_observation_fk
  FOREIGN KEY (upgraded_by_observation_id) REFERENCES observation(observation_id)
  ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED;

validation_rules: email must be valid email format and <=255 chars
session strategy is JWT with maxAge 3600 seconds
implementation_notes: Slice 1 §1.6: credentials provider only; no OAuth providers in MVP.
Slice 1 §1.6 JWT contract: token includes sub, company_id, role and session projects user_id/company_id/role.
Slice 1 §1.14: failed sign-in surfaces Auth.js code CredentialsSignin while UI shows French copy on /login page.
Slice 1 §1.6 cookie policy: httpOnly true, sameSite lax, secure in production, maxAge 3600 seconds.

body.description: Auth.js session/provider/callback response — shape varies by sub-route

error_responses.condition: Auth.js redirects on OAuth callback or sign-in

implementation_notes: GET handles: session polling, OAuth provider redirects, callback processing, CSRF token fetch. Managed entirely by Auth.js NextAuth() handler. Source: implementation_plan.md §1.3, §1.6 — auth.ts catch-all handles GET and POST.

steps.label: Instantiate queue
steps.detail: Create BullMQ Queue with name 'ocr-job' and shared Redis connection.

steps.label: Apply retention
steps.detail: Set default removeOnComplete count=500 and removeOnFail count=1000.

error_handling: Queue declaration errors surface during module initialization and should fail process boot in development.

steps.label: Instantiate queue
steps.detail: Create BullMQ Queue named embedding-job with shared Redis connection.

error_handling: Connection errors are logged by Redis client and queue operations fail on enqueue call sites.

steps.label: Apply retention
steps.detail: Set completed and failed retention caps to bounded counts.

steps.label: Apply timeout
steps.detail: Use 300000 ms to align with extraction stage budget.

error_handling: No worker consumer in Slice 1; declaration only.
No PDF worker implementation in Slice 1; only declaration.
Queue unavailable errors are surfaced by producer operations in later slices.

types_and_interfaces.name: AuthJWT
types_and_interfaces.definition: interface JWT { sub: string; company_id: string; role: "admin" | "editor" | "viewer"; iat: number; exp: number; }

types_and_interfaces.name: SessionUser
types_and_interfaces.definition: interface SessionUser { user_id: string; company_id: string; role: "admin" | "editor" | "viewer"; name?: string | null; email?: string | null; image?: string | null; }

types_and_interfaces.name: WithTenant
types_and_interfaces.definition: type WithTenant = <T>(db: DrizzleDatabase, companyId: string, callback: (tx: DrizzleTransaction) => Promise<T>) => Promise<T>;

types_and_interfaces.name: DbTypes
types_and_interfaces.definition:
type DbSelect<T extends abstract new (...args: any) => any> = InferSelectModel<T>;
type DbInsert<T extends abstract new (...args: any) => any> = InferInsertModel<T>;

constants.name: LOW_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD
constants.purpose: Single threshold for low OCR confidence classification.

constants.name: QUEUE_NAMES
constants.purpose: Canonical queue names used by app and workers.

acceptance_criteria: GET / returns 200 for authenticated users and redirects unauthenticated users to /login.
auth() returns JWT claims with shape { user_id, company_id, role }.
Public schema table count is at least 21 after migrations.
Cross-tenant read attempt with mismatched app.current_company_id returns zero rows.
French sidebar renders exactly seven nav items: Tableau de bord, Documents, Observations, Conflits, Rapports, Chat, Paramètres.
TypeScript compile check passes with tsc --noEmit.
Unit tests pass with vitest run.
Integration tests pass against fresh PostgreSQL 16 + pgvector and Redis.
Playwright verifies login redirect guard and successful credential login flow.
Boot fails fast with descriptive missing env key errors when required vars are absent.

known_spec_deviations.reason: Slice 1 reconciles to assistant/tool roles instead of legacy agent/system to match MCP + LLM message model.
Stores html_snapshot_r2_key in report table instead of inline html text for scalability and payload size control.
Uses 0.70 as canonical threshold per pipeline spec decision.
Adds user.password_hash, key_equivalence_cache.company_id, and audit_log.company_id fields required for auth and RLS integrity.

known_spec_deviations.item: Post-definition .references() pattern for circular foreign keys
known_spec_deviations.location: Drizzle schema definitions for documentCategories.parentCategoryId and evidenceBlocks.parentBlockId
known_spec_deviations.spec_says: Foreign key references are declared inline within the column definition.
known_spec_deviations.plan_does: Uses tableName.column.references(() => ...) after the table definition for self-referential and circular FK columns.
known_spec_deviations.rationale: Drizzle ORM requires the post-definition .references(() => ...) callback pattern for self-referencing and circular foreign keys to avoid referencing a table before it is fully defined. This is the standard Drizzle approach for such cases.

implementation_order: Initialize project scaffolding and strict TypeScript/Tailwind/Auth.js base files.
Implement src/lib/env.ts and wire all modules to env singleton imports.
Implement Drizzle DB client and withTenant RLS transaction helper.
Create migration files 0001..0007 and run drizzle-kit migrate in order.
Enable and verify RLS policies including special-case chat_message and conflict_resolution joins.
Implement Auth.js credentials provider, JWT/session callbacks, and nextauth route handler.
Add middleware route protection and login route/page with French validation messages.
Implement Redis, R2, and all six BullMQ queue declarations with timeout defaults.
Create app shell layout with sidebar/topbar placeholders and root dashboard placeholder.
Run unit, integration, and E2E checks for env validation, auth callback claims, middleware redirects, and table count/RLS behavior.
